The fact should not be lost sight
OF that the entire trouble could
probably be settled In a few days
II the company would recognize the
right OF the electricians to organize
as a union. The company is a
member of one of the largest
unions In the world, the Manufac.
turers association, which has for
its object the destruction of every
union in America. The right to
organize, which the company
claims as It's privilege, it denies
to its employees.
